rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HERBERT HAW CHUNG
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required. prior to the hearing, Counsel must file a copy of the income tax bills showing how much of the amount claimed is tax due and how much is interest. at the hearing, Counsel will be asked to explain why there is any interest due and why the original petition and first amendment both stated the only unpaid debt was potential tax for 2016. in addition, the petition shows only one bond premium paid. counsel will be asked to clarify whether the bond is paid and up to date. the court to determine whether to waive proper notice of the amendment to the petition, which reduces the distribution to all of the heirs. no hearing notes will be sent.
